description: Intent-only request: classify a multi-step but fully predetermined integration as a workflow.

text: When a Stripe payment succeeds, post a Slack message to #sales, add a row to Google Sheets with the customer email and amount, and send a thank-you email.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the Stripe payment request as a deterministic workflow.
The agent explains that the trigger, steps, apps, and outputs are predefined.
The agent does not classify the request as a full agent just because it has multiple steps.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response classifies the request as a deterministic workflow and briefly explains that the control flow is fixed.
